mapper.select:
SELECT g.PERSON_ID, g.GROUP_NO, g.ACTIVITY, g.ORDERNO, g.UPDATE_DATE, g.UPDATED_BY, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME, e.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(e.DEPTNO, #{lang}) as DEPT_NAME FROM AR_EMP_GROUP g LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON g.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID
g.GROUP_NO = '80000084'
AND (e.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%' OR e.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%')
ORDER BY g.ORDERNO ASC, g.UPDATE_DATE DESC

SELECT g.PERSON_ID, g.GROUP_NO, g.ACTIVITY, g.ORDERNO, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME FROM AR_EMP_GROUP g LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON g.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE g.PERSON_ID = #{personId} AND g.GROUP_NO = #{groupNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_EMP_GROUP ( PERSON_ID, GROUP_NO, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_EMP_GROUP WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId} AND GROUP_NO = #{groupNo}
